extraction_notes: All extracted figures are consolidated. Revenue growth calculated as ((FY25 Revenue - FY24 Revenue) / FY24 Revenue) * 100 = ((439695 - 434016) / 434016) * 100 = 1.309%. EBITDA margin calculated as (EBITDA / Revenue) * 100 = (57649 / 439695) * 100 = 13.11%. The complete list of directors (beyond the Chairman), depreciation, finance cost, and cash flow figures (operating, capex, free cash flow) could not be extracted as the detailed financial statements (starting page 294) and the full 'Board of Directors' section (page 14) were not provided in the input text.
extraction_method: VectorLess RAG — Split two-call + notes extraction
